did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a bibliometric analysis of the literature landscape regarding AI in skin cancer research. It uses bibliometric tools (CiteSpace, VOSviewer) to analyze publication trends, citations, and keywords from the Web of Science database. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning methods to obtain its own study results; rather, it reviews and maps existing research that utilizes these technologies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
